utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Check if fully specified with all details: Each requires the coverage type plus costs. Health: has plan name, details, and a cost, but the cost is described as 'Part of the integrated package, component cost is €330/month before discount'—still a cost is provided. Property: same pattern with €90/month before discount—cost given. Travel: cost €115/month before discount—cost given. Additional services: has details and cost €0—cost provided. Total budget: provides monthly (€438.70) and annual (€5,264.40) cost with a breakdown—complete cost breakdown present. Therefore, all 5 items are included and specified with costs and details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three items with explicit plan names that appear in the ground-truth ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan (Physical + Mental Health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan. These correspond to entries under primary_health_coverage (both physical and mental variants), property_protection > home_content, and mobility_coverage > travel_insurance, respectively.
